column1: # Example roadbook. Copy this into inputs/ (e.g. inputs/roadbook.csv) and edit.
#   km          distance along the GPX track where the point sits (decimal km)
#   type        category: a name from the enum below
#   description text shown on the device (keep it short; a leading "!" reads as a warning)
#   waypoint 0 | sprint point 1 | hc climb 2 | level 1 climb 3 | level 2 climb 4
#   level 3 climb 5 | level 4 climb 6 | supply point 7 | garbage recycle area 8
#   restroom 9 | service point 10 | medical aid station 11 | equipment area 12
#   shop 13 | meeting point 14 | viewing platform 15 | instagram-worthy location 16
#   tunnel 17 | valley 18 | dangerous road 19 | sharp turn 20 | steep slope 21
# NB: there is no "fountain" or "food" category; "supply point" is the closest for water/feed.
